title: cercanthemum dependens
intro: Cercanthemum dependens, also known as Daisy Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Cercanthemum dependens include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin problems and respiratory issues.
